question: Considering the performance comparison and evaluation context provided, which statement best describes the relationship between o3 and Gemini-2.5-Pro as evaluated on the CS.arXiv dataset?

options.A: o3 and Gemini-2.5-Pro have the same performance on the CS.arXiv dataset because their accuracies are identical.
options.B: Gemini-2.5-Pro shows superior performance over o3 on the CS.arXiv dataset, reflecting higher model accuracy.
options.C: o3 outperforms Gemini-2.5-Pro on the CS.arXiv dataset, even though both models show identical accuracies.
options.D: Neither o3 nor Gemini-2.5-Pro was effectively evaluated on the CS.arXiv dataset, leaving their comparative performance unclear.

explanation: The correct answer is A because the context explicitly states that while o3 and Gemini-2.5-Pro have identical accuracies, o3 outperforms Gemini-2.5-Pro in every category when evaluated on the CS.arXiv dataset.
